title: Intensely Citrusy Ukrainian Cheese Pilaf
description: A romantic and citrusy Ukrainian dish featuring molten cheese and a blend of citrus flavors, perfect for a special occasion.

ingredients.name: Instant Yeast
ingredients.notes: active dry yeast can be substituted

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the cauliflower rice and cook until lightly browned, stirring frequently.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the chicken broth, lemon zest, orange zest, and shio-cure salt.
Add the broth mixture to the saucepan with the cauliflower rice and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix the instant yeast with 1 tablespoon of warm water and let it sit for 5 minutes.
Stir the yeast mixture into the cauliflower rice mixture and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with the shredded mozzarella cheese.
Dot the top of the cheese with the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
